channel.title: GitHub Handlebars Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Handlebars in GitHub

item.title: CrunchyData/postgres-operator-examples
item.description: Examples for deploying applications with PGO, the Postgres Operator from Crunchy Data

item.title: wet-boew/wet-boew
item.description: Web Experience Toolkit (WET): Open source code library for building innovative websites that are accessible, usable, interoperable, mobile-friendly and multilingual. This collaborative open source project is led by the Government of Canada.

item.title: rust-lang/rust-by-example
item.description: Learn Rust with examples (Live code editor included)

item.title: rust-unofficial/patterns
item.description: A catalogue of Rust design patterns, anti-patterns and idioms
